## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `./tests/smoke.sh`.
- [ ] I ran `shellcheck bin/* install.sh uninstall.sh tests/smoke.sh` or noted why not.
- [ ] I updated README/docs/tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I considered privacy implications for selected text and logs.

## Notes

Mention any GNOME/Wayland/audio environment details relevant to testing.
